details.test: Task 1: Adult eligibility check and open cheapest recommended plan
Task 2: Compare plans and save one with lowest ER copay under $60
Task 3: Cost estimator - open details for second-cheapest MRI within 10 miles
Task 4: Find highly rated pediatrician within 5 miles and save provider
Task 5: Switch to Spanish and view pharmacy instructions for generic prescriptions under $20
Task 6: Enable high contrast & 125% text, open mental health coverage summary
Task 7: FAQ lost phone flow and temporary digital health card request (details step to review)
Task 8: Child eligibility for 7-year-old, open cheapest child plan under $40/month
Task 9: Find and open 2026 Student Digital Health Card Guide PDF
